title: × neotinacamptis durandii
intro: × Neotinacamptis durandii, also known as Durand's wintergreen, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of southeastern Europe and western Asia, and its leaves contain salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin with anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The medicinal properties of × Neotinacamptis durandii have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, headaches, and joint pain, making it a valuable herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
